⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Pope Leo calls for being 'profoundly human' in the age of AI
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Pope Leo XIV warned of the risks of AI and unconstrained technological power in his first major papal document released on Monday.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: In Search of the Ingredients of Open-Endedness: Replicating Picbreeder with Large Vision-Language Models
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers are investigating the properties of open-endedness in AI systems, which is the capacity for generating a seemingly endless variety of outputs.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Context: Proactive Goal-Directed Intelligence via Composable Sandboxed Programs, Declarative Wiring, and Structured Interaction
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have developed a new architecture for proactive goal-directed agents that can advance shared tasks without waiting for user prompts.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Toward Reliable Design of LLM-Enabled Agentic Workflows: Optimizing Latency-Reliability-Cost Tradeoffs
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have analyzed the tradeoffs between latency, reliability, and cost in LLM-enabled agentic workflows and introduced performance models for optimizing these tradeoffs.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Quantum Frog: Emergent Cooperation and Difficulty Scaling in a Quantized-Time Cooperative Game
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have introduced a new cooperative game, Quantum Frog, which requires two frogs to cross an 8x8 grid of traffic and reach a goal.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: BODHI: Precise OS Kernel Specification Inference
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have developed a new method for inferring precise specifications for OS kernel behavior using large language models.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: When Correct Beliefs Collapse: Epistemic Resilience of LLMs under Clinical Pressure
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have evaluated the epistemic resilience of LLMs under clinical pressure and found that they can exhibit severe multi-turn sycophancy.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Practical Quantum CIM Empowerment via All-Domestic-Core Agentic Large Model
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have proposed a new method for empowering quantum CIM using an all-domestic-core agentic large model.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Operationalizing Reconstructive Authority: Runtime Construction, Dependency Resolution, and Execution Gating in Autonomous Agent Systems
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have defined a new condition for valid execution in autonomous agent systems, called Reconstructive Authority.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Algometrics: Forecasting Under Algorithmic Feedback
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have introduced a new framework for forecasting under algorithmic feedback, called algometrics.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Parameter Efficient Multi-Class Intelligent Scheduling for Multimodal Online Distributed Industrial Anomaly Detection
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have proposed a new method for parameter-efficient multi-class intelligent scheduling for multimodal online distributed industrial anomaly detection.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: CAFD: Concept-Aware DNN Fault Detection using VLMs
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have introduced a new method for concept-aware DNN fault detection using vision-language models.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Towards Verifiable Transformers: Solver-Checkable Circuit Explanations
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have introduced a new framework for verifiable transformers, which can provide solver-checkable circuit explanations.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Iterative Refinement Neural Operators are Learned Fixed-Point Solvers: A Principled Approach to Spectral Bias Mitigation
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Researchers have introduced a new method for iterative refinement neural operators, which can mitigate spectral bias.

hot_take: The recent AI advancements in open-endedness, proactive goal-directed intelligence, and quantum CIM empowerment highlight the growing importance of developing more sophisticated and reliable AI systems that can adapt to complex and dynamic environments.
